<!-- authority-sha256: 7c2ddf15c8389c69e19f50cc0a6321e9664c17d654ed80c6223baab7ba84aee9 -->
# Repository Commands

- `pnpm dev`: `turbo run dev --filter=@support/web`
- `pnpm build`: `turbo run build`
- `pnpm build:affected`: `turbo run build --affected`
- `pnpm start`: `pnpm --filter @support/web start`
- `pnpm lint`: `turbo run lint`
- `pnpm typecheck`: `turbo run typecheck`
- `pnpm architecture`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=required`
- `pnpm governance`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=all`
- `pnpm governance:generated`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=generated`
- `pnpm governance:knowledge`: `node scripts/check-architecture.mjs --profile=knowledge`
- `pnpm architecture:contexts`: `node scripts/scaffold-context-readmes.mjs`
- `pnpm architecture:docs`: `node scripts/generate-module-map.mjs`
- `pnpm serena:memories`: `node scripts/generate-serena-memories.mjs`
- `pnpm test`: `pnpm run test:architecture && turbo run test`
- `pnpm test:architecture`: `vitest run --config vitest.config.ts`
- `pnpm test:e2e`: `turbo run test:e2e --filter=@support/web`
- `pnpm test:e2e:affected`: `turbo run test:e2e --filter=@support/web --affected`
- `pnpm ci:quality`: `turbo run lint typecheck test`
- `pnpm ci:quality:affected`: `turbo run lint typecheck test --affected`
- `pnpm check:architecture`: `pnpm run architecture && pnpm run governance:generated && pnpm run test:architecture`
- `pnpm check`: `pnpm run check:architecture && turbo run lint typecheck test`
- `pnpm check:full`: `pnpm run check:architecture && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e`
- `pnpm check:affected`: `pnpm run check:architecture && turbo run lint typecheck test --affected`
- `pnpm check:full:affected`: `pnpm run check:architecture && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --affected`
- `pnpm turbo:dry-run`: `turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --dry-run`
